@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team(6) ∧ deadline("4 months")
P: store("PostgreSQL") → low_ops
V: traffic(modest) ∧ split(post_release)
A: fast_ship

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(modular_monolith).
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months").
Plan: store("PostgreSQL") then low ops.
Verify: traffic(modest) and split(post_release).
Answer target: fast shipping.
